scan_output: Single-rule scan failed for sshd_disable_compression (rule=xccdf_org.ssgproject.content_rule_sshd_disable_compression). Could not verify.

llm_verdict.message:
<function=review_plan>
<parameter=plan_description>
We will:
  1. Read the contents of /etc/ssh/sshd_config.
  2. Split the contents into lines.
  3. For each line:
     a. Determine if the line has optional leading whitespace and then an optional '#' followed by whitespace.
     b. If so, remove the leading whitespace and the '#' and any whitespace after it to get the content.
     c. Else, the content is the line after removing leading whitespace.
     d. If the content starts with the string "Compression":
        i. Let after_compression = the substring of content starting at index 10 (since "Compression" is 10 characters).
        ii. If after_compression is empty or consists only of whitespace, set new_after_compression = " no".
        iii. Else, replace the first sequence of optional whitespace followed by one or more non-whitespace characters in after_compression with "no".
        iv. Let new_content = "Compression" + new_after_compression.
        v. If the line had a leading '#', then new_line = "# " + new_content; else, new_line = new_content.
     e. Else, new_line = the original line.
  4. Join the new_lines with newline characters to form the new content.
  5. Write the new content to /etc/ssh/sshd_config.
</parameter>
</function>
